mapper.update: UPDATE biz_notification SET is_read = 1, read_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO biz_notification (user_id, type, title, content, related_type, related_id, is_read, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.type}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.relatedType}, #{item.relatedId}, #{item.isRead}, #{item.createTime})
